page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.12xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. It features 48 dedicated physical cores with 48 vCPUs, utilizing a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached options. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps, supporting high-throughput networking requirements. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.g7ne.12xlarge offers a balanced resource profile suitable for general-purpose enterprise workloads. The dedicated physical cores ensure consistent compute performance without resource contention. This hardware profile is well-suited for applications such as web serving, database hosting, enterprise application servers, and general-purpose business logic processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.12xlarge is a general-purpose virtual server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at 3.3 GHz. It delivers 48 dedicated physical cores and 48 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration, paired with 192.0 GB of system memory. This configuration establishes a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, the instance does not feature local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps to support high-throughput network communication. Lacking integrated GPUs, this instance is optimized for non-accelerated workloads. It is suited for enterprise applications, web serving, and database workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and consistent performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.12xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 48 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 40 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for enterprise workloads.
